review_reason: Phase 2 (Well-Ordering Approach) blocked due to fundamental mathematical impossibility - the plan's claim that well-order minimality implies timeline minimality is incorrect

partial_progress.details: Phase 2 blocked: The well-founded minimal successor approach has a fundamental flaw - arbitrary well-order minimality does not imply timeline minimality. The SuccOrder.ofCore condition requires timeline-minimality which this approach cannot provide.

blocker.description: Plan claims WellFounded.min on arbitrary well-order gives timeline-minimum of Ioi M. This is false - the well-order and timeline order are independent.
alternatives: Complete blocking formula covering proof (3 sorries in DiscreteSuccSeed.lean)
Modify discreteStagedBuild to use blocking formula seeds
Accept axiom as documented technical debt

errors.message: Plan v5 Approach 2 (well-founded minimal successor) cannot achieve its stated goal
errors.recommendation: Revise plan to use different approach: either complete blocking formula covering proof or modify staged build infrastructure

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 2 blocked due to fundamental mathematical impossibility in the well-founded minimal successor approach. Analysis showed that arbitrary well-order minimality does not imply timeline minimality. Axiom discrete_Icc_finite_axiom remains.
